data.name: Reports are ordered by time. Scroll down to see older reports.
data.value: Reports are ordered by time. Scroll down to see older reports.

data.name: This week's report has been submitted!
data.value: This week's report has been submitted!

data.name: What have you done this week? (Markdown supported)
data.value: What have you done this week? (Markdown supported)

data.name: You have missed ALL weekly reports in the last 4 weeks! This is a serious issue. Please submit them immediately!
data.value: You have missed ALL weekly reports in the last 4 weeks! This is a serious issue. Please submit them immediately!

data.name: You have missed submitting some weekly reports in the last 4 weeks. Please catch up!
data.value: You have missed submitting some weekly reports in the last 4 weeks. Please catch up!

data.name: You have missed submitting weekly reports in the last 4 weeks. Please catch up!
data.value: You have missed submitting weekly reports in the last 4 weeks. Please catch up!

data.name: You haven't submitted any reports in the last 4 weeks!
data.value: You haven't submitted any reports in the last 4 weeks!

data.name: You haven't submitted this week's report yet.
data.value: You haven't submitted this week's report yet.

data.name: Your reports for the last 4 weeks are all submitted.
data.value: Your reports for the last 4 weeks are all submitted.
